name: wiki-article-header
description: Top-of-article surface: slug breadcrumb, H1 title (from frontmatter), quality badge, and byline (last edited + editor + history link). Maps Wikipedia article-header muscle-memory using IBM Plex Sans at 2.25rem h1.
html:
1. {{category-name}}

{{title}}

{{quality-grade-label}}
Last edited {{display-date}} · {{editor-display-name}} · View history

variants.name: ungraded
variants.description: Badge omitted; title row is H1 only.

aria: Breadcrumb <nav aria-label='Article location'> with <ol>. Quality badge <span aria-label='Article quality: {{grade-label}}'>. aria-current='page' on last breadcrumb item. <time datetime> for machine-readable date.
